---
title: "SQL commands from lesson 32 — aggregate functions, GROUP BY, HAVING"
---

Extracted from [sql0030-sqlFunctions_aggregateFunctions_groupBy_having-v019](https://y-rosenthal.github.io/DataManagementUsingR/sql0030-sqlFunctions_aggregateFunctions_groupBy_having-v019.html). Each statement is the SQL string passed to `sqldf()` in the source lesson ([sql0030-sqlFunctions_aggregateFunctions_groupBy_having-v019.qmd](sql0030-sqlFunctions_aggregateFunctions_groupBy_having-v019.qmd)), in the same order as in the chapter. There are 88 commands.

## Command 1

```sql
select * from titles
```

## Command 2

```sql
select title_name, price from titles
```

## Command 3

```sql
select upper(title_name), price from titles
```

## Command 4

```sql
select price from titles
```

## Command 5

```sql
select avg(price) from titles
```

## Command 6

```sql
select 3+2,   10*2,   23/5,   23.0/5
```

## Command 7

```sql
select 3+2 as A,   10*2 as B,   23/5 as C,   23.0/5 as D
```

## Command 8

```sql
select 3+2 A,   10*2 B,   23/5 C,   23.0/5 D
```

## Command 9

```sql
select upper('abcde')
```

## Command 10

```sql
select * from titles
```

## Command 11

```sql
select title_name
       from titles
       limit 5
```

## Command 12

```sql
select upper(title_name)
      from titles
      limit 5
```

## Command 13

```sql
select upper(title_name) as title
      from titles
      limit 5
```

## Command 14

```sql
select title_name, upper(title_name) as TITLE_NAME
      from titles
      limit 5
```

## Command 15

```sql
select upper(title_name) as TITLE_NAME, price
      from titles
      limit 5
```

## Command 16

```sql
select upper(title_name) as TITLE_NAME, *
       from titles
       limit 5
```

## Command 17

```sql
select title_name, pubdate
      from titles
```

## Command 18

```sql
select title_name, rtrim(pubdate, '0:') as publication_date
      from titles
```

## Command 19

```sql
select title_id, substr(title_id, 2, 2) as title_number from titles
```

## Command 20

```sql
select title_id, substr(title_id, 2, 200) as title_number from titles
```

## Command 21

```sql
select title_name, substr(title_name, 1, 20) as abbreviated_title from titles
```

## Command 22

```sql
select title_name, substr(title_name, 1, 20) || ' ...' as abbreviated_title from titles
```

## Command 23

```sql
select *
       from titles
       where substr(pubdate, 2, 1) = '/'
       order by title_name
```

## Command 24

```sql
select title_name, type, pubdate
       from titles
       where substr(pubdate, 2, 1) != '/'
       order by pubdate
```

## Command 25

```sql
select title_name, type, pubdate 
       from titles
       where substr(pubdate, 3, 1) = '/'
```

## Command 26

```sql
select title_name, type, pubdate 
       from titles
       where substr(pubdate, 1, 2) in ('10','11','12')
```

## Command 27

```sql
select title_name, trim(pubdate, '0123456789: ') 
       from titles
```

## Command 28

```sql
select title_name, trim(trim(pubdate, '0123456789: '),'/') as dayOfMonth
       from titles
```

## Command 29

```sql
select title_name, trim(pubdate, '0123456789: /') as dayOfMonth
       from titles
```

## Command 30

```sql
select * from titles
```

## Command 31

```sql
select avg(price),  min(price) , max(price)
      from titles
```

## Command 32

```sql
select avg(price), sum(pages),  title_name, type
      from titles
```

## Command 33

```sql
select * from titles
```

## Command 34

```sql
select sum(price) , avg(price) , avg(DISTINCT price), count(*), count(price) , count(DISTINCT price), min(price) , max(price), count(type), count(DISTINCT type)
      from titles
```

## Command 35

```sql
select min(type), max(type), count(*), count(type), count(DISTINCT type)
      from titles
```

## Command 36

```sql
select distinct type from titles order by type asc
```

## Command 37

```sql
select DISTINCT type
      from titles
```

## Command 38

```sql
select type
      from titles
```

## Command 39

```sql
select type, pub_id
      from titles
      order by type, pub_id
```

## Command 40

```sql
select distinct type, pub_id
      from titles
      order by type, pub_id
```

## Command 41

```sql
select * from titles
```

## Command 42

```sql
select count(*), max(price), avg(price) 
        from titles
```

## Command 43

```sql
select count(*), max(price), avg(price)
        from titles
        where type = 'biography'
```

## Command 44

```sql
select distinct au_fname, au_lname
       from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
       where royalty_shares = 1.0
       order by au_lname asc, au_fname asc
```

## Command 45

```sql
select au_fname, au_lname
       from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
       where royalty_shares = 1.0
       order by au_lname asc, au_fname asc
```

## Command 46

```sql
 select distinct au_fname, au_lname, royalty_rate
        from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                     join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                     join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
        where royalty_rate > .05
        order by au_lname, au_fname
```

## Command 47

```sql
 select distinct au_fname, au_lname
        from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                     join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                     join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
        where royalty_rate > .06
        order by au_lname, au_fname
```

## Command 48

```sql
select authors.*, title_authors.* 
      from authors CROSS JOIN title_authors
```

## Command 49

```sql
select authors.*, title_authors.*
      from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
```

## Command 50

```sql
select authors.*, title_authors.*, titles.*
      from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                   join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
```

## Command 51

```sql
select authors.*, title_authors.*, titles.*, royalties.*
      from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                   join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                   join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
```

## Command 52

```sql
select authors.*, title_authors.*, titles.*, royalties.*
               from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                            join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                            join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
               where royalty_rate > .06
```

## Command 53

```sql
select authors.*, title_authors.*, titles.*, royalties.*
               from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                            join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                            join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
               where royalty_rate > .06
               order by au_lname, au_fname
```

## Command 54

```sql
select au_fname, au_lname
               from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                            join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                            join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
               where royalty_rate > .06
               order by au_lname, au_fname
```

## Command 55

```sql
select DISTINCT au_fname, au_lname
               from authors join title_authors on authors.au_id = title_authors.au_id
                            join titles        on title_authors.title_id = titles.title_id
                            join royalties     on titles.title_id = royalties.title_id
               where royalty_rate > .06
               order by au_lname, au_fname
```

## Command 56

```sql
select count(*), sum(pages), avg(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
      from titles
      where type = 'this type does not exist'
```

## Command 57

```sql
select count(*), sum(pages), avg(pages)
      from titles
      where type = 'cookbook'
```

## Command 58

```sql
select avg(price) from titles
```

## Command 59

```sql
select title_name from titles
```

## Command 60

```sql
select avg(price) , title_name from titles
```

## Command 61

```sql
select type, price 
      from titles 
      order by type, price
```

## Command 62

```sql
select type, count(*), avg(price), max(price), min(price)
      from titles
      group by type
      order by type
```

## Command 63

```sql
select type, count(*) as '#copies', avg(price), max(price), min(price)
      from titles
      group by type
      order by type
```

## Command 64

```sql
select count(*) as '#copies', avg(price), max(price), min(price)
      from titles
```

## Command 65

```sql
select type, pub_id, price, title_name
       from titles
       order by type, pub_id, price
```

## Command 66

```sql
select type, pub_id, count(*)
       from titles
       group by type, pub_id
       order by type, pub_id
```

## Command 67

```sql
select type, pub_id, count(*) as '#copies', avg(price), min(price), max(price)
      from titles
      group by type, pub_id
      order by type
```

## Command 68

```sql
select type, pub_id, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type, pub_id   
      order by pub_id, type
```

## Command 69

```sql
select pub_id, type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type, pub_id
      order by pub_id, type
```

## Command 70

```sql
select pub_id, type, title_name, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type, pub_id
      order by pub_id, type
```

## Command 71

```sql
select titles.*, publishers.*
      from titles join publishers on titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
      order by pub_name, type
```

## Command 72

```sql
select pub_name, type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles join publishers on titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
      group by type, pub_name
      order by pub_name, type
```

## Command 73

```sql
select pub_name, type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles join publishers on titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
      group by type, publishers.pub_id
      order by pub_name, type
```

## Command 74

```sql
select pub_name, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles join publishers on titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
      group by pub_name
      order by pub_name
```

## Command 75

```sql
select pub_name, type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles join publishers on titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
      group by pub_name
      order by pub_name
```

## Command 76

```sql
select * 
       from titles
       order by type
```

## Command 77

```sql
select type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type
      order by type
```

## Command 78

```sql
select type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type
      having count(*) >=3 
      order by type
```

## Command 79

```sql
select type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type
      order by type
```

## Command 80

```sql
select type, avg(price), count(*), min(price), max(price), sum(price)
      from titles
      group by type
      having count(*) >=3 and (avg(price) >= 20 or avg(price) <= 10)
      order by type
```

## Command 81

```sql
select type, count(*), count(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
       from titles
       GROUP BY TYPE
       order by type
```

## Command 82

```sql
select type, count(*), count(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
       from titles
       WHERE PAGES > 350
       GROUP BY TYPE
       order by type
```

## Command 83

```sql
select type, pages, title_name
       from titles
       order by type, pages, title_name
```

## Command 84

```sql
select type, pages, title_name
       from titles
       WHERE PAGES > 350
       order by type, pages, title_name
```

## Command 85

```sql
select type, count(*), count(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
       from titles
       GROUP BY TYPE
       order by type
```

## Command 86

```sql
select type, count(*), count(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
       from titles
       group by type
       having count(*) > 1
       order by type
```

## Command 87

```sql
select type, count(*), count(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
       from titles
       where pages > 350
       group by type
       order by type
```

## Command 88

```sql
select type, count(*), count(pages), min(pages), max(pages)
       from titles
       where pages > 350
       group by type
       having count(*) > 1
       order by type
```
